---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new command or feature
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Describe the feature**
What command or feature would you like to see?

**Use case**
How would you use this feature in your trading workflow?

**Proposed command**
```bash
tradekit <proposed-command> [flags]
```

**Additional context**
Any other context or mockups.
